mapper.select:
SELECT
DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(ro.create_time, INTERVAL WEEKDAY(ro.create_time) DAY), '%Y-%m-%d') AS date
DATE_FORMAT(ro.create_time, '%Y-%m-01') AS date
DATE(ro.create_time) AS date
, COUNT(*) AS total , SUM(CASE WHEN ro.status = 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS completed FROM repair_order ro WHERE ro.create_time >= CONCAT(#{startDate}, ' 00:00:00') AND ro.create_time <= CONCAT(#{endDate}, ' 23:59:59') GROUP BY
DATE_SUB(ro.create_time, INTERVAL WEEKDAY(ro.create_time) DAY)
DATE_FORMAT(ro.create_time, '%Y-%m')
DATE(ro.create_time)
ORDER BY date ASC
